description: Add volume confirmation filter to entry — require current bar volume > 1.2x its 20-bar SMA to confirm breakout is backed by real participation, not just thin-air spike.

Shorten breakout entry period from 24→20 bars to widen the candidate set and capture momentum earlier in strong trends.
